name: Apple Buttermilk Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugars; beat in eggs one at a time and vanilla.
3. Stir in buttermilk alternately with the flour mixture.
4. Fold in apples, nuts, and orange zest.
5. Pour into two 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 5/8 inch greased and floured loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 50-60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; remove from pan and cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Wrap and let stand overnight to allow flavors to blend.
